agent_notes.note: ⚠️ AUTORESEARCH CRITICAL WARNING (Cycle cycle-17): Trading cycle audit reveals a critical operational state despite high data quality. The system exhibits a low win rate of 38% (3 wins, 2 losses, 3 failures) and suffers from multiple backend failures including datetime handling errors, missing auditor modules, and connection refused errors for embedding APIs. While no data gaps exist, the frequency of execution timeouts and logging failures indicates significant infrastructure instability.

⚠️ AUTORESEARCH CRITICAL WARNING (Cycle cycle-17): The trading system exhibits critical performance degradation with a 38% win rate and 3 losses against 3 wins in 8 resolved trades. While data quality is high (98%) and no data gaps exist, the system faces severe technical instability including datetime handling errors in scheduling, connection refused errors for embedding APIs, and post-cycle agent timeouts. The low win rate combined with these infrastructure failures indicates an urgent need for architectural review and model retraining.

⚠️ AUTORESEARCH CRITICAL WARNING (Cycle sim-bear): Trading cycle audit reveals a critical system health status due to repeated tool execution failures in risk calculation and datetime handling errors in scheduling. Despite high data quality (99%) and zero data gaps, the 40% win rate combined with timeout warnings and partial agent returns indicates significant instability in the decision-making pipeline.

⚠️ AUTORESEARCH CRITICAL WARNING (Cycle battle-o): The trading system is in a critical state due to a complete lack of trading decisions (0 BUY, 0 SELL, 0 HOLD) despite high data quality (98%). The root cause is a datetime handling error in the scheduling module ('can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes'), which likely prevented the execution logic from running. While the LLM component is stable with 0 failures, the system is currently non-functional for trading.

⚠️ AUTORESEARCH CRITICAL WARNING (Cycle battle-o): The trading cycle audit indicates a critical failure state where no trading decisions were generated due to a manual cancellation of the pipeline. A specific code-level error regarding datetime offset handling was detected in the scheduling module, contributing to the instability.
